name: pulumi-registry-get-function
description: Returns information about a Pulumi Registry function

provider.description: The cloud provider (e.g., 'aws', 'azure', 'gcp', 'random') or github.com/org/repo for Git-hosted components

module.description: The module to query (e.g., 's3', 'ec2', 'lambda'). If not specified it will match functions with the given name in any module.

version.description: The provider version to use (e.g., '6.0.0'). If not specified, uses the latest available version.
